transcription.text: This week in TV Guide, Newton Minow takes another look at television. Fifteen years ago, as FCC chairman, he called TV a vast wasteland. Today, he thinks it's our most important educational institution. Find out what changed his mind and why in TV Guide.

segments.text: This week in TV Guide, Newton Minow takes another look at television.
Fifteen years ago, as FCC chairman, he called TV a vast wasteland.
Today, he thinks it's our most important educational institution.
Find out what changed his mind and why in TV Guide.
